name: n8n
description: Workflow API wrapper for n8n to read, create, activate, and trigger workflows.
capability_summary: Lets agents manage and run n8n workflows via API using vault-managed credentials.

parameters.name: workflow_id
parameters.description: n8n workflow identifier used for read, trigger, activate, and deactivate operations.

parameters.name: workflow_json
parameters.description: JSON object string for creating a workflow definition.

parameters.name: payload_json
parameters.description: JSON object string passed to workflow trigger execution.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of workflows to return in list mode.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Trigger a workflow run with payload JSON.
